question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

answer: The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.

assessment.note: She says the push succeeded but rejects that pace becoming normal, which signals mild strain around sustaining the work even though wellbeing was off-signature.

new_queue.label: Thread follow
new_queue.name: push worked, want — can you say more about what that means for you right now?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Post-sprint load
new_queue.name: Now that the sprint pressure has eased, what’s actually driving your workload right now?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Visibility gap
new_queue.name: Where does your work feel least visible right now, Nina?

new_queue.label: Influence bottleneck
new_queue.name: What’s getting in the way when you try to move things with stakeholders?

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week?

new_queue.label: Steadier finish
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
